text.title: Brand Voice Consistency System Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the operator publish on ≥3 channels AND use AI for ≥30% of prose?

branch.question: Does a voice doc exist AND is its last_drift_audit ≤90 days old?

text.example: Multi-channel operator with no voice doc → run procedure end-to-end + record baseline drift.
